name: Bran Castle, Peleș Castle & Brașov Day Trip from Bucharest
tagline: Dracula's castle, Romania's grandest palace, and a medieval Saxon city — all in one day
overview: Romania's most iconic tour packs three world-class destinations into a single extraordinary day. Begin at Bran Castle — the fortress linked to the Dracula legend — then visit the neo-Renaissance masterpiece of Peleș Castle before exploring the cobblestone streets of medieval Brașov. With over 20,000 reviews, this is one of GetYourGuide's highest-rated European castle tours.
highlights: Visit Bran Castle, Transylvania's most famous fortress
Tour the lavish interiors of Peleș Castle
Free time in the medieval city of Brașov
Available in 5 languages with licensed guides

itinerary.description: Explore the medieval fortress perched dramatically above Transylvania. Associated with Bram Stoker's Dracula, the castle houses a fascinating museum of royal artefacts and medieval weapons.
Tour one of Europe's most opulent royal residences, built for King Carol I of Romania. 160 rooms of gilded interiors, Flemish tapestries, and an armoury await inside this neo-Renaissance masterpiece.
Free exploration of the best-preserved medieval Saxon city in Transylvania. Walk the cobbled Strada Republicii, see the Black Church, and take in views from the city walls.

meeting_point: Bucharest city centre — confirmed at booking
tips: Start time is early (around 7–8am) — this is a long day but worth every minute
At €11/person this is exceptional value for three major sites
Book well in advance — with 20,000+ reviews this sells out daily in peak season

faqs.question: Why is this tour so affordable?
faqs.answer: Romania has a lower cost of living than Western Europe. The price reflects local market rates while the quality of the experience is world-class.

faqs.question: Is Bran Castle really Dracula's castle?
faqs.answer: Bram Stoker's description of Castle Dracula closely matches Bran, though there is no definitive historical link to Vlad the Impaler. The legend and the castle atmosphere are equally compelling.

hero_image.alt: Bran Castle rising above the Transylvanian forest at dusk

meta.title: Bran Castle & Peleș Castle Day Trip from Bucharest
meta.description: Book the best Transylvania castle day trip from Bucharest. Visit Bran Castle, Peleș Castle and Brașov with a licensed guide. From $11 per person — one of Europe's best-value tours.
